commit.subject: LU-18049 tests: sanity-sec 31 with client 2.15.58-44
commit.message:
LU-18049 tests: sanity-sec 31 with client 2.15.58-44

Check how often sanity-sec_31 fails with client v2_15_58-44-g14ed4a6f8f.

Build-Parameters: distro=el8.8 arch=x86_64
Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-sec env=ONLY=31,ONLY_REPEAT=30 serverversion=2.14 clientdistro=el8.8
